title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Structure Brief: Resource Budget
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 resource budget increment in an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enforce time, memory, recursion, and output budgets under adversarial scale.
Connect proof obligations to executable invariants, oracle comparisons, and counterexamples.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
